name: Tex-Mex Roasted Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cup Unpeeled, seeded & coarsely chopped tomatoes.
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first six ingredients; stir well and set aside.
2. Remove giblets and neck from the chicken and discard. Rinse the chicken and pat dry.
3. Rub the outside of the chicken with the spice mixture.
4. Place the chicken, breast side down, in a deep 3-quart casserole dish.
5. Cover with wax paper and microwave at high for 8 to 9 minutes.
6. Turn the chicken, breast side up, and microwave covered with wax paper at high for another 8 to 9 minutes.
7. Remove the chicken to a serving platter. Reserve drippings in the casserole dish.
8. Let the chicken stand covered for 15 minutes.
9. Add vegetables to the drippings; toss to coat. Microwave at high for 3 to 4 minutes, or until crisp-tender, stirring halfway through the cooking process.
10. Arrange the vegetables around the chicken.
Serving suggestion:
About 192 calories per 3 oz. of chicken and 1 1/4 cups of vegetables (Fat: 6.8g, Cholesterol: 76mg).
